init.title: Security Settings
init.description: Configure the Unleashed security features for your {exposed_count} exposed entities. These settings can also be set via YAML — UI settings take priority when both are configured.

data_description.presence_entity: Entity that tracks whether you are home (ON = home, OFF = away). Used by entities with presence requirement enabled.
data_description.require_acknowledgment: Select entities that require voice confirmation ("Are you sure?") before executing commands via Google Assistant.
data_description.require_presence: Select entities that should only respond to commands when you are home (based on the presence entity above).

request_sync.description: Sends a request_sync command to Google.

agent_user_id.description: Only needed for automations. Specific Home Assistant user ID (not username, ID in Settings > People > Users > under username) to sync with Google Assistant. Not needed when you use this action through Home Assistant frontend or API. Used in automation, script or other place where context.user_id is missing.
agent_user_id.name: Agent user ID

request_sync.name: Request sync

export_unleashed_config.name: Export unleashed config
export_unleashed_config.description: Exports the current unleashed security settings (require_acknowledgment, require_presence, presence_entity) to a YAML file in your config directory. Useful for migrating back to YAML-only configuration.

filename.name: Filename
filename.description: Name of the export file, written to your Home Assistant config directory.
